title: A Fully Integrated Model from Farm to Market
description: We combine deep local expertise with global standards, leveraging innovation, sustainability, and scale to unlock Africa's agricultural potential.

divisions.title: Sourcing & Origination
divisions.description: We work directly with smallholder farmers, cooperatives, and large-scale producers across Africa to source quality agricultural commodities. Our sourcing model prioritises fair pricing, traceability, and long-term partnerships that empower farming communities.
highlights: Direct farmer engagement across multiple African countries
Quality assurance at the point of origin
Fair pricing and transparent trade practices
Cooperative development and farmer training programs

divisions.title: Processing & Manufacturing
divisions.description: Through owned and partnered facilities, we transform raw agricultural products into high-quality, value-added food, feed, and industrial ingredients. Our processing operations meet international quality and safety standards.
highlights: Modern processing facilities across key markets
Value-added products for food, feed, and industry
Continuous investment in technology and capacity

divisions.title: Trading & Distribution
divisions.description: Our trading and logistics platform connects African producers with domestic, regional, and international markets. We manage the full supply chain — from farm-gate collection to last-mile delivery.
highlights: Domestic, regional, and international market access
Integrated logistics and supply chain management
Risk management and trade finance solutions

divisions.title: Branding & Retail
divisions.description: We develop consumer-facing brands that bring quality, traceability, and trust to the African food market. From cooking oils to flours and ready-to-use ingredients, our products are designed for modern African consumers.
highlights: Consumer brands built on quality and trust
Product innovation for modern African consumers
Retail and food service distribution channels
